name: Stained Glass Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl with an electric mixer on medium speed, beat the margarine, sugar, honey, egg, and vanilla extract until thoroughly blended.
2. Gradually blend in the flour, baking powder, baking soda, and salt. Cover and chill for at least 2 hours.
3. On a lightly floured surface, roll out the dough to a thickness of 1/4 inch. Use cookie cutters to cut the dough into desired shapes.
4. Trace smaller versions of the cookie shape onto the dough, leaving a 1/2 to 3/4 inch border around the edges. Cut out and set aside the center pieces of dough.
5. Place the cookie outlines on baking sheets lined with foil.
6. Crush each color of candy separately between two layers of waxed paper using a mallet.
7. Spoon the crushed candy into the centers of the cookies.
8. Bake at 350°F for 6-8 minutes, or until the candy is melted and the cookies are lightly browned. Allow the cookies to cool completely before removing them from the foil.
Makes 3 1/2 dozen cookies.
